action.content: What are the best things to do in Rochester, New York? Can you write them as a song and use music notation in your response? Make sure to include the keywords 'festival' and 'river'.
action.label: context

action.content:
Here is a song about the best things to do in Rochester, New York, complete with lyrics and musical notation.

### **Title: The City of Flowers (Rocherester)**
**Tempo:** Allegro (Lively)
**Time Signature:** 4/4

```text
Key: C Major
Time: 4/4

| C   | G   | Am  | F   |
(Verse 1)
Wake up early, see the sun rise bright
Over the Genesee, a morning light
Walk the banks where the water flows
Watch the boats and the ducks go slow

| C   | G   | Em  | Am  |
(Pre-Chorus)
Head to High Falls, hear the roar
Nature's power, standing tall and more
Then head downtown to see the show
Where the people come and the crowds will grow

| F   | C   | G   | C   |
(Chorus)
Oh, Rochester, you are so grand
The best place in all the land
Catch the spirit of the festival
Dancing round the river, never restful!
(Yeah, never restful!)

| F   | C   | G   | C   |
(Chorus)
Oh, Rochester, you are so grand
The best place in all the land
Catch the spirit of the festival
Dancing round the river, never restful!

| Am  | Em  | F   | C   |
(Bridge)
From the zoo to the art museum floor
There's something waiting for you always more
The flowers bloom in the summer air
We love this city with a special care

| F   | C   | G   | C   |
(Outro)
So come visit, don't be late
Rochester is a beautiful fate
By the river, in the light
Everything is gonna be alright!
(Fade out)
```

**Musical Notation (Standard Notation Snippet):**

```text
      C          G          Am         F
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| C3 | G3 | A3 | C4 | G3 | E3 | A3 | C4 | F3 | A3 | C4 | G3 | C4 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
      (Verse 1)
      C          G          Em         Am
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| C3 | G3 | E3 | G3 | C3 | E3 | A3 | C4 | G3 | E3 | A3 | C4 | G3 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
      (Chorus)
      F          C          G          C
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| F3 | A3 | C4 | G3 | C3 | E3 | G3 | C4 | F3 | A3 | C4 | G3 | C4 |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
```

**Notes on the Song:**
*   **The River:** The lyrics reference the **Genesee River**, which is central to Rochester's history and scenery.
*   **The Festival:** The chorus highlights the **festival** atmosphere, a nod to events like the Rochester International Jazz Festival or the Flower Show, which are major draws for visitors.
*   **Structure:** The song follows a standard Verse-Chorus structure with a bridge to build energy before the final resolution.
action.label: response
